name: empty_queryspec_array_fallback
description: Resolved facet key (overview) present but value is empty array -> fallback to default_facet. Since default_facet is also overview (same as resolved, both empty), but schema facet has entries. The classifier resolves with facet_hint=overview. Since overview is empty and default_facet (overview) is the same, _resolve_candidate_facet returns None. However, this tests the scenario where resolved facet is empty but a different default_facet would work. Here we use custom inventory where overview is empty but schema has entries — but default_facet is overview, so fallback also fails. Actually the intent is: resolved facet empty -> fall to default_facet -> default_facet has entries -> use it. We need default_facet != resolved facet for this. Since the classifier always resolves to overview for hooks.pre_tool_use (alias facet_hint=overview), and default_facet is overview, both are same. Instead, we set default_facet to schema (which has entries) while the classifier resolves to overview (empty). This way overview=[] triggers fallback to schema=[...] which succeeds.

turns.input_text: How do I write a PreToolUse hook?

hooks.pre_tool_use.content: PreToolUse hooks run before tool execution.
